Sreejith M S

DevOps Engineer & Cloud Architect @ Synnefo Solutions

Scroll
↓

About Me

I build the engines that keep the cloud running. As a passionate DevOps Engineer and Cloud Architect, my obsession is turning chaotic, manual deployments into sleek, automated, zero-downtime pipelines.

From bare-metal Linux administration to architecting highly available Kubernetes clusters on AWS, I thrive in the space where development meets operations. When I'm not writing Terraform scripts or tightening security protocols, I'm mentoring the next wave of engineers to build a more resilient digital world.

RHCSA Certified: 250-136-470

50+ Projects

Successfully delivered highly scalable cloud infrastructure solutions for global clients.

20+ Migrations

Architected and executed complex zero-downtime multi-cloud infrastructure migrations.

100+ Deployments

Designed end-to-end CI/CD pipelines reducing software deployment lifecycles by 70%.

Mentorship

Guided over 15 junior engineers in DevOps best practices, Kubernetes, and Cloud orchestration.

Career Journey

2024 - Present

Technical Head

Architecting robust cloud infrastructure, optimizing CI/CD pipelines, and leading a team of DevOps Engineers to deliver highly scalable, secure, and automated enterprise solutions.

  • Led a team of 8 engineers across 15+ enterprise client projects
  • Reduced deployment failures by 90% through GitOps workflow standardization
  • Architected multi-region HA clusters handling 50K+ RPM
AWSKubernetesTerraformPython
2023

Junior DevOps

Streamlined software delivery by implementing comprehensive CI/CD automation, containerizing microservices with Docker, and provisioning infrastructure as code.

  • Built 20+ CI/CD pipelines cutting release cycles from days to minutes
  • Containerized 12 legacy monoliths into production-ready microservices
  • Automated infrastructure provisioning saving 30+ hours/week
DockerGitLab CIJenkinsAnsible
2022

Cloud Engineer

Managed and scaled enterprise cloud environments, performed advanced system migrations, and ensured strict security compliance and 99.9% uptime.

  • Maintained 99.9% uptime across 200+ production cloud instances
  • Achieved RHCSA certification (ID: 250-136-470)
  • Implemented automated patching reducing vulnerability windows by 80%
CloudLinuxBashSecurity
2021

Linux Admin

Handled daily server provisioning, user administration, backup routines, and proactive system monitoring to prevent downtime.

  • Provisioned and configured 50+ bare-metal and VM-based servers
  • Designed backup strategies with RPO under 4 hours for critical data
LinuxCronSystemdMonitoring
2020

Network Eng.

Configured routing protocols, managed VPNs, and maintained secure network architectures bridging internal teams and client data centers.

  • Managed site-to-site VPN tunnels connecting 8 client data centers
  • Reduced network outages by 60% with proactive monitoring dashboards
RoutingVPNFirewallsCisco
2018

Net Admin

Started career by performing network infrastructure troubleshooting, bandwidth monitoring, and ensuring physical data center connectivity.

  • Maintained physical connectivity for 500+ rack-mounted devices
  • First responder for critical network incidents with <15-min MTTR
SwitchesCablingTCP/IPDHCP
Impact

700+ Mentored

  • Developed open-source learning paths for Kubernetes and CI/CD operations
